{{short description|Brief guide to Wikipedia formatting codes}} {{pp-semi-indef}}{{pp-move-indef}}
{{Help pages header}}
 {{Notice|For a complete list of wikitext codes, see [[Help:Wikitext]]. For information on special words, see [[Help:Magic words]].|shortcut1=H:CS|shortcut2=H:CHEAT|shortcut3=WP:CHEAT|shortcut4=WP:CHEATSHEET}} {|align="center" class="notheme" style="width:100%; border:2px #a3b1bf solid; background:#f5faff; text-align:left;" |colspan="3" align="center" style="background:#cee0f2; text-align:center;" |


Wikitext cheatsheet

|- | colspan=3 style="background:#E6F2FF; border-top:2px #a3b1bf solid;text-align:center;" | '''Works anywhere in the text'''         |- style="background:#E6F2FF; padding:0.3em; font-size: 0.9em; text-align:center;" | style="border-bottom:2px #a3b1bf solid" width="30%" | Description | style="border-bottom:2px #a3b1bf solid" | You type | style="border-bottom:2px #a3b1bf solid" width="30%" | You get |- |Italics{{Anchor|Italic text}}, bold{{Anchor|Bold text}}, and both{{Anchor|bold and italic}} | ''italics'', '''bold''', and '''''both''''' | ''italics'', '''bold''', and '''''both''''' |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Linking|Link]]{{Anchor|Internal link}} to another page
''see [[Help:Interwikimedia links]] for linking to sister projects''
| [[copy edit]]
[[copy edit]]ors | [[copy edit]]
[[copy edit]]ors |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- | "[[Wikipedia:Piped link|Pipe]]" a link to change the link's text | [[Android (operating system)|Android]] | [[Android (operating system)|Android]] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- | Link to a section | [[Frog#Locomotion]]
[[Frog#Locomotion|locomotion in frogs]]
{{slink|Frog#Locomotion}} | [[Frog#Locomotion]]
[[Frog#Locomotion|locomotion in frogs]]
{{slink|Frog#Locomotion}} |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[WP:RED|Red link]]
''Links to pages that don't exist are automatically red. Red links in articles often help by showing desired [[WP:REDIRECT|redirects]] or [[WP:N|notable]] pages. ''
| [[Red link example]] | [[Red link example]] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Plain website | https://www.wikipedia.org | https://www.wikipedia.org |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Link a website | [https://www.wikipedia.org] | [https://www.wikipedia.org] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Link and name a website | [https://www.wikipedia.org/ Wikipedia] | [https://www.wikipedia.org/ Wikipedia] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Help:Citations quick reference|Citations, references, and footnotes]]
sources in the article will appear where {{reflist}} is put, typically under a level 2 section heading (see below) towards the bottom of the page; text between {{}} is for a [[Help:Template|template]].
| Hello[https://www.loc.gov/about/ Library of Congress] World!{{cite web |url=https://www.w3.org/ |title = World Wide Web Consortium (W3C)}} Hello again!Perry's Handbook, Sixth Edition, McGraw-Hill Co., 1984. References: {{reflist}} | Hello[https://www.loc.gov/about/ Library of Congress] World!{{cite web |url=https://www.w3.org/ |title = World Wide Web Consortium (W3C)}} Hello again!Perry's Handbook, Sixth Edition, McGraw-Hill Co., 1984. References: {{reflist}} |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Template:Citation needed]]
''one of many [[WP:TC|cleanup templates]]''
| This statement is true.{{cn}} | This statement is true.{{cn}} |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Wikipedia:Signatures|Signature]]{{Anchor|Signature}}
''sign your contributions when posting to a [[Wikipedia:Tutorial (Talk pages)|talk page]]''
| ~~~~

''do not sign in an article, only on talk pages'' | [[Special:Mypage|Username]] ([[Special:Mytalk|talk]]) {{CURRENTTIME}}, {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} (UTC) |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Ping a user on a [[Help:Talk pages#Notifications|talk page]]
''so they will see your comment''
| [[User:Example]] or {{u|Example}} | [[User:Example]] or {{u|Example}} |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[WP:STRIKE|Strike]] your [[WP:TALK|talk page]] comment
''to show your previous comment is outdated''
| This topic isn't [[WP:N|notable]]. | This topic isn't [[WP:N|notable]]. |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[WP:Underline|Underline]] your text | This topic is notable | This topic is notable |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Hide comment(s) somewhere for editors; hidden comments are visible only in the editors
''[[WP:CON|consensus]] is how things are decided''
| | |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial|Show an image]]
''for uploading, see the [[Help:Introduction to uploading images|intro to uploading images]]''
{{Anchor|Thumbnail image}} | [[File:Wiki.png|thumb|Caption]] | [[File:Wiki.png|thumb|Caption]] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Add a page to a [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Categories|category]]{{Anchor|Add a page to a category}} |[[Category:Category name]]

''place near the bottom of a page'' |''shows'' "Category name" ''in a bar at bottom when the page is previewed or published'' |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Link to a [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Categories|category]] or [[Help:Files|file]] |
[[:Category:Category name]]
[[:File:File name]] |
[[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]]
[[:File:Example.jpg]] |- | colspan="3" style="background:#E6F2FF; border-top:2px #a3b1bf solid; text-align:center;" | '''Works only at the beginning of lines'''     |- style="background:#E6F2FF; padding:0.3em; font-size: 0.9em; text-align:center;" | style="border-bottom:2px #a3b1bf solid" width="30%" | Description | style="border-bottom:2px #a3b1bf solid" | You type | style="border-bottom:2px #a3b1bf solid" width="30%" | You get |- |[[Wikipedia:Redirect|Redirect to another page]]{{Anchor|Redirect to another page}}
''redirects must be placed at the start of the first line''
| #REDIRECT [[Target page]] | [[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|30px|link=]] [[Target page]] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Wikipedia:Redirect|Redirect to a section of another page]] | #REDIRECT [[Target page#anchorName]] | [[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|30px|link=]] [[Target page#anchorName]] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Help:Section|Section headings]]{{Anchor|Section headings}}
''a Table of Contents will automatically be generated when four headings are added to an article''
| == Level 2 ==
=== Level 3 ===
==== Level 4 ====
===== Level 5 =====
====== Level 6 ======

''do not use''  = Level 1 =  ''as it is for page titles'' | == Level 2 == === Level 3 === ==== Level 4 ==== ===== Level 5 ===== ====== Level 6 ====== |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Help:List|Bulleted list]]{{Anchor|Bulleted list}} | * One
* Two
** Two point one
* Three | * One * Two ** Two point one * Three |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Help:List|Numbered list]]{{Anchor|Numbered list}} | # One
# Two
## Two point one
# Three | # One # Two ## Two point one # Three |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Indenting text{{Anchor|Indenting text}}
''this is used when replying on a [[Wikipedia:Tutorial (Talk pages)|talk page]], to make it easier to follow conversations.
After a string of indents, or to revive a discussion, an outdent {{Outdent|n}} ([[Template:Outdent]]) can be used to reset the paragraph to the left margin.''
| no indent (normal)
: first indent
:: second indent
::: third indent
:::: fourth indent
{{Outdent|4}} return to left margin | no indent (normal)
: first indent :: second indent ::: third indent :::: fourth indent {{Outdent|4}} return to left margin |} {{Quicktemplates|state=expanded}} == See also == {{ombox|image=none|small=y|text='''Note''': You can use the [[Wikipedia:Sandbox|sandbox]] to experiment with page editing.|imageright=[[File:Sandbox.svg|42px]]}} [[File:Wiki_markup_cheatsheet_EN.pdf|upright|thumb|Wiki markup quick reference (PDF download)]] * For a full list of editing commands, see [[Help:Wikitext]] * For including parser functions, variables and behavior switches, see [[Help:Magic words]] * For a guide to displaying mathematical equations and formulas, see [[Help:Displaying a formula]] * For a guide to editing, see [[Wikipedia:Contributing to Wikipedia]] * For an overview of commonly used style guidelines, see [[Wikipedia:Simplified Manual of Style]] * For a page on how to use Wikipedia in bite-sized morsels, see [[Wikipedia:Tips]] * For advice on writing style and formatting in a bullet-point format, see [[Wikipedia:Styletips]] * For summaries of some Wikipedia protocols and conventions, see [[Wikipedia:Dos and don'ts]] * If you don't want to use wikitext markup, try [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor]] instead * '''To ask a question''', see [[Wikipedia:Questions]] to locate the appropriate venue(s) ----

''this is used when replying on a [[Wikipedia:Tutorial (Talk pages)|talk page]], to make it easier to follow conversations.
After a string of indents, or to revive a discussion, an outdent {{Outdent|n}} ([[Template:Outdent]]) can be used to reset the paragraph to the left margin.''

# Three | # One # Two ## Two point one # Three |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Indenting text{{Anchor|Indenting text}}
''this is used when replying on a [[Wikipedia:Tutorial (Talk pages)|talk page]], to make it easier to follow conversations.
After a string of indents, or to revive a discussion, an outdent {{Outdent|n}} ([[Template:Outdent]]) can be used to reset the paragraph to the left margin.''
| no indent (normal)
: first indent
:: second indent
::: third indent
:::: fourth indent
{{Outdent|4}} return to left margin | no indent (normal)
: first indent :: second indent ::: third indent :::: fourth indent {{Outdent|4}} return to left margin |} {{Quicktemplates|state=expanded}} == See also == {{ombox|image=none|small=y|text='''Note''': You can use the [[Wikipedia:Sandbox|sandbox]] to experiment with page editing.|imageright=[[File:Sandbox.svg|42px]]}} [[File:Wiki_markup_cheatsheet_EN.pdf|upright|thumb|Wiki markup quick reference (PDF download)]] * For a full list of editing commands, see [[Help:Wikitext]] * For including parser functions, variables and behavior switches, see [[Help:Magic words]] * For a guide to displaying mathematical equations and formulas, see [[Help:Displaying a formula]] * For a guide to editing, see [[Wikipedia:Contributing to Wikipedia]] * For an overview of commonly used style guidelines, see [[Wikipedia:Simplified Manual of Style]] * For a page on how to use Wikipedia in bite-sized morsels, see [[Wikipedia:Tips]] * For advice on writing style and formatting in a bullet-point format, see [[Wikipedia:Styletips]] * For summaries of some Wikipedia protocols and conventions, see [[Wikipedia:Dos and don'ts]] * If you don't want to use wikitext markup, try [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor]] instead * '''To ask a question''', see [[Wikipedia:Questions]] to locate the appropriate venue(s) ----

{{short description|Brief guide to Wikipedia formatting codes}} {{pp-semi-indef}}{{pp-move-indef}}
{{Help pages header}}
 {{Notice|For a complete list of wikitext codes, see [[Help:Wikitext]]. For information on special words, see [[Help:Magic words]].|shortcut1=H:CS|shortcut2=H:CHEAT|shortcut3=WP:CHEAT|shortcut4=WP:CHEATSHEET}} {|align="center" class="notheme" style="width:100%; border:2px #a3b1bf solid; background:#f5faff; text-align:left;" |colspan="3" align="center" style="background:#cee0f2; text-align:center;" |


Wikitext cheatsheet

|- | colspan=3 style="background:#E6F2FF; border-top:2px #a3b1bf solid;text-align:center;" | '''Works anywhere in the text'''         |- style="background:#E6F2FF; padding:0.3em; font-size: 0.9em; text-align:center;" | style="border-bottom:2px #a3b1bf solid" width="30%" | Description | style="border-bottom:2px #a3b1bf solid" | You type | style="border-bottom:2px #a3b1bf solid" width="30%" | You get |- |Italics{{Anchor|Italic text}}, bold{{Anchor|Bold text}}, and both{{Anchor|bold and italic}} | ''italics'', '''bold''', and '''''both''''' | ''italics'', '''bold''', and '''''both''''' |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Linking|Link]]{{Anchor|Internal link}} to another page
''see [[Help:Interwikimedia links]] for linking to sister projects''
| [[copy edit]]
[[copy edit]]ors | [[copy edit]]
[[copy edit]]ors |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- | "[[Wikipedia:Piped link|Pipe]]" a link to change the link's text | [[:en:Android (operating system)|Android]] | [[:en:Android (operating system)|Android]] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- | Link to a section | [[Frog#Locomotion]]
[[Frog#Locomotion|locomotion in frogs]]
{{slink|Frog#Locomotion}} | [[Frog#Locomotion]]
[[Frog#Locomotion|locomotion in frogs]]
{{slink|Frog#Locomotion}} |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[WP:RED|Red link]]
''Links to pages that don't exist are automatically red. Red links in articles often help by showing desired [[WP:REDIRECT|redirects]] or [[WP:N|notable]] pages. ''
| [[Red link example]] | [[Red link example]] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Plain website | https://www.wikipedia.org | https://www.wikipedia.org |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Link a website | [https://www.wikipedia.org] | [https://www.wikipedia.org] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Link and name a website | [https://www.wikipedia.org/ Wikipedia] | [https://www.wikipedia.org/ Wikipedia] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Help:Citations quick reference|Citations, references, and footnotes]]
sources in the article will appear where {{reflist}} is put, typically under a level 2 section heading (see below) towards the bottom of the page; text between {{}} is for a [[Help:Template|template]].
| Hello[https://www.loc.gov/about/ Library of Congress] World!{{cite web |url=https://www.w3.org/ |title = World Wide Web Consortium (W3C)}} Hello again!Perry's Handbook, Sixth Edition, McGraw-Hill Co., 1984. References: {{reflist}} | Hello[https://www.loc.gov/about/ Library of Congress] World!{{cite web |url=https://www.w3.org/ |title = World Wide Web Consortium (W3C)}} Hello again!Perry's Handbook, Sixth Edition, McGraw-Hill Co., 1984. References: {{reflist}} |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Template:Citation needed]]
''one of many [[WP:TC|cleanup templates]]''
| This statement is true.{{cn}} | This statement is true.{{cn}} |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Wikipedia:Signatures|Signature]]{{Anchor|Signature}}
''sign your contributions when posting to a [[Wikipedia:Tutorial (Talk pages)|talk page]]''
| ~~~~

''do not sign in an article, only on talk pages'' | [[Special:Mypage|Username]] ([[Special:Mytalk|talk]]) {{CURRENTTIME}}, {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} (UTC) |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Ping a user on a [[Help:Talk pages#Notifications|talk page]]
''so they will see your comment''
| [[User:Example]] or {{u|Example}} | [[User:Example]] or {{u|Example}} |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[WP:STRIKE|Strike]] your [[WP:TALK|talk page]] comment
''to show your previous comment is outdated''
| This topic isn't [[WP:N|notable]]. | This topic isn't [[WP:N|notable]]. |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[WP:Underline|Underline]] your text | This topic is notable | This topic is notable |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Hide comment(s) somewhere for editors; hidden comments are visible only in the editors
''[[WP:CON|consensus]] is how things are decided''
| | |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial|Show an image]]
''for uploading, see the [[Help:Introduction to uploading images|intro to uploading images]]''
{{Anchor|Thumbnail image}} | [[File:Wiki.png|thumb|Caption]] | [[File:Wiki.png|thumb|Caption]] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Add a page to a [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Categories|category]]{{Anchor|Add a page to a category}} |[[Category:Category name]]

''place near the bottom of a page'' |''shows'' "Category name" ''in a bar at bottom when the page is previewed or published'' |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Link to a [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Categories|category]] or [[Help:Files|file]] |
[[:Category:Category name]]
[[:File:File name]] |
[[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]]
[[:File:Example.jpg]] |- | colspan="3" style="background:#E6F2FF; border-top:2px #a3b1bf solid; text-align:center;" | '''Works only at the beginning of lines'''     |- style="background:#E6F2FF; padding:0.3em; font-size: 0.9em; text-align:center;" | style="border-bottom:2px #a3b1bf solid" width="30%" | Description | style="border-bottom:2px #a3b1bf solid" | You type | style="border-bottom:2px #a3b1bf solid" width="30%" | You get |- |[[Wikipedia:Redirect|Redirect to another page]]{{Anchor|Redirect to another page}}
''redirects must be placed at the start of the first line''
| #REDIRECT [[Target page]] | [[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|30px|link=]] [[Target page]] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Wikipedia:Redirect|Redirect to a section of another page]] | #REDIRECT [[Target page#anchorName]] | [[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|30px|link=]] [[Target page#anchorName]] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Help:Section|Section headings]]{{Anchor|Section headings}}
''a Table of Contents will automatically be generated when four headings are added to an article''
| == Level 2 ==
=== Level 3 ===
==== Level 4 ====
===== Level 5 =====
====== Level 6 ======

''do not use''  = Level 1 =  ''as it is for page titles'' | == Level 2 == === Level 3 === ==== Level 4 ==== ===== Level 5 ===== ====== Level 6 ====== |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Help:List|Bulleted list]]{{Anchor|Bulleted list}} | * One
* Two
** Two point one
* Three | * One * Two ** Two point one * Three |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Help:List|Numbered list]]{{Anchor|Numbered list}} | # One
# Two
## Two point one
# Three | # One # Two ## Two point one # Three |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Indenting text{{Anchor|Indenting text}}
''this is used when replying on a [[Wikipedia:Tutorial (Talk pages)|talk page]], to make it easier to follow conversations.
After a string of indents, or to revive a discussion, an outdent {{Outdent|n}} ([[Template:Outdent]]) can be used to reset the paragraph to the left margin.''
| no indent (normal)
: first indent
:: second indent
::: third indent
:::: fourth indent
{{Outdent|4}} return to left margin | no indent (normal)

''this is used when replying on a [[Wikipedia:Tutorial (Talk pages)|talk page]], to make it easier to follow conversations.
After a string of indents, or to revive a discussion, an outdent {{Outdent|n}} ([[Template:Outdent]]) can be used to reset the paragraph to the left margin.''
| no indent (normal)
: first indent
:: second indent
::: third indent
:::: fourth indent
{{Outdent|4}} return to left margin | no indent (normal)
: first indent :: second indent ::: third indent :::: fourth indent {{Outdent|4}} return to left margin |} {{Quicktemplates|state=expanded}} == See also == {{ombox|image=none|small=y|text='''Note''': You can use the [[Wikipedia:Sandbox|sandbox]] to experiment with page editing.|imageright=[[File:Sandbox.svg|42px]]}} [[File:Wiki_markup_cheatsheet_EN.pdf|upright|thumb|Wiki markup quick reference (PDF download)]] * For a full list of editing commands, see [[Help:Wikitext]] * For including parser functions, variables and behavior switches, see [[Help:Magic words]] * For a guide to displaying mathematical equations and formulas, see [[Help:Displaying a formula]] * For a guide to editing, see [[Wikipedia:Contributing to Wikipedia]] * For an overview of commonly used style guidelines, see [[Wikipedia:Simplified Manual of Style]] * For a page on how to use Wikipedia in bite-sized morsels, see [[Wikipedia:Tips]] * For advice on writing style and formatting in a bullet-point format, see [[Wikipedia:Styletips]] * For summaries of some Wikipedia protocols and conventions, see [[Wikipedia:Dos and don'ts]] * If you don't want to use wikitext markup, try [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor]] instead * '''To ask a question''', see [[Wikipedia:Questions]] to locate the appropriate venue(s) ----

{{Help pages header}}
 {{Notice|For a complete list of wikitext codes, see [[Help:Wikitext]]. For information on special words, see [[Help:Magic words]].|shortcut1=H:CS|shortcut2=H:CHEAT|shortcut3=WP:CHEAT|shortcut4=WP:CHEATSHEET}} {|align="center" class="notheme" style="width:100%; border:2px #a3b1bf solid; background:#f5faff; text-align:left;" |colspan="3" align="center" style="background:#cee0f2; text-align:center;" |


Wikitext cheatsheet

|- | colspan=3 style="background:#E6F2FF; border-top:2px #a3b1bf solid;text-align:center;" | '''Works anywhere in the text'''         |- style="background:#E6F2FF; padding:0.3em; font-size: 0.9em; text-align:center;" | style="border-bottom:2px #a3b1bf solid" width="30%" | Description | style="border-bottom:2px #a3b1bf solid" | You type | style="border-bottom:2px #a3b1bf solid" width="30%" | You get |- |Italics{{Anchor|Italic text}}, bold{{Anchor|Bold text}}, and both{{Anchor|bold and italic}} | ''italics'', '''bold''', and '''''both''''' | ''italics'', '''bold''', and '''''both''''' |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Linking|Link]]{{Anchor|Internal link}} to another page
''see [[Help:Interwikimedia links]] for linking to sister projects''
| [[:en:Copy edit|Copy edit]]
[[:en:Copy edit|Copy edit]]ors | [[:en:Copy edit|Copy edit]]
[[:en:Copy edit|Copy edit]]ors |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- | "[[Wikipedia:Piped link|Pipe]]" a link to change the link's text | [[:en:Android (operating system)|Android]] | [[:en:Android (operating system)|Android]] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- | Link to a section | [[Frog#Locomotion]]

''Links to pages that don't exist are automatically red. Red links in articles often help by showing desired [[WP:REDIRECT|redirects]] or [[WP:N|notable]] pages. ''
| [[Red link example]] | [[Red link example]] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Plain website | https://www.wikipedia.org | https://www.wikipedia.org |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Link a website | [https://www.wikipedia.org] | [https://www.wikipedia.org] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |Link and name a website | [https://www.wikipedia.org/ Wikipedia] | [https://www.wikipedia.org/ Wikipedia] |- |colspan="3" style="border-top:1px solid #cee0f2;"| |- |[[Help:Citations quick reference|Citations, references, and footnotes]]
sources in the article will appear where {{reflist}} is put, typically under a level 2 section heading (see below) towards the bottom of the page; text between {{}} is for a [[Help:Template|template]].
| Hello[https://www.loc.gov/about/ Library of Congress] World!{{cite web |url=https://www.w3.org/ |title = World Wide Web Consortium (W3C)}} Hello again!Perry's Handbook, Sixth Edition, McGraw-Hill Co., 1984.
